text:
Hello World! I'm <https://arcades.agency/portfolio.html|Arcade Wise>, 18 and from... I guess the southeastern United States? I've lived all over and college is in Iowa.
Given the mention of college I bet you can figure out that I'm a student, studying Computer Science and German.
I haven't had enough time recently to do much coding, but I think y'all might like my project "<https://arcades.agency/icbinf.html|I CAN'T BELIEVE IT'S NOT FORTH>," a little project to write HTML widgets in a forth-like language.

I've been mainly involved with the folk.computer people, I really think projected AR is a really interesting thing that not enough people have access to. I'm also tangential to the <https://computingwithinlimits.org/2025/|LIMITS> (Computing Within Limits) conference, and the larger degrowth-club of Rome movement as a whole.

As for how I got into the FoC community, I was introduced to Ivan and Co. by Lu, whose videos I had watched for a while and met at Strange Loop (RIP).
